intake.sub: Nangma adingin Pasian biakna hun ka bawlsak ding uh hi.
intake.subBack: Na hong pai kik ka kipak mahmah uh hi. Nangma adingin biakna hun ka bawlsak ding uh hi.
intake.namePh: Na gen nop kei leh khualpa min kong pia ding uh hi
intake.emailReq: (kisam hi — theihsakna kong khak ding uh hi)
intake.emailPhLater: Theihsakna na muh nadingin na email gelh in
intake.emailPhNow: Nang hong kipahpih kik thei nadingin
intake.moodLabel: Tuni in na lungsim bangci hiam?
intake.customMoodLabel: A hih kei leh na lungsim thuakna kammal khat tawh gen in (na deih leh)
intake.prayerPh: Na lungsim sunga om thute hong gen in…
intake.whenLabel: Bang hun in na biakna na deih hiam?
intake.preparing: Na biakna ka bawl laitak uh hi…
intake.customize: Thungetna gelh ding ahih kei leh hun khen ding
intake.noAccount: Account kigelhsak theih nai hi · minute khat bek laitak
